name: Telehealth Room
description: Video consultation room for telehealth appointments with speaker-focused layout, session controls, and provider notes.

page_briefs.session: Telehealth session at /telehealth/:id. Speaker-focused video layout with the active speaker in a large center frame and the patient's self-view in a smaller picture-in-picture corner. Bottom toolbar has mic, camera, screen-share, and end-call controls. Side panel (collapsible) for session notes, shared documents, and chat.

shells.minimal-header: Minimal top bar with session info and controls, maximized content area
